title: Sample Script
excerpt: A short film exploring the intersection of memory and place.

sections.heading: Logline
sections.content: A woman returns to her childhood home and discovers that memories live in the walls.

sections.heading: Scene 1
sections.content: INT. OLD HOUSE - DAY. Dust motes dance in the afternoon light. The sound of floorboards creaking under careful footsteps.

sections.heading: Scene 2
sections.content: EXT. GARDEN - CONTINUOUS. Overgrown roses crawl up a trellis. A forgotten swing moves gently in the breeze.

title: Treatment: The Last Light
excerpt: A sci-fi drama about a lighthouse keeper at the end of the world.

sections.heading: Logline
sections.content: The last lighthouse keeper on a dying Earth must decide whether to save one final ship or protect the secret that could save humanity.

sections.heading: Character Breakdown
sections.content: ELARA (30s) - A stoic woman who has spent ten years alone in the lighthouse. She speaks to recordings of her deceased mentor.

sections.heading: Act 1
sections.content: The lighthouse stands on a cliff at the edge of the world. The seas are rising. The last ships have stopped coming.

title: Research Paper: Visual Storytelling in Marketing
excerpt: An analysis of how visual narrative drives consumer engagement.

sections.heading: Abstract
sections.content: This paper examines the relationship between visual narrative techniques and consumer engagement across digital platforms.

sections.heading: Methodology
sections.content: A mixed-methods approach combining quantitative analysis of engagement metrics with qualitative interviews of creative directors.

sections.heading: Findings
sections.content: Brands that use consistent visual narratives see 40% higher engagement rates and 25% higher brand recall.

title: Script: The Last Letter
excerpt: A period drama about a love story told through letters.

sections.heading: Logline
sections.content: In 1940s England, a woman discovers a hidden box of letters that reveal a decades-old love story.

sections.heading: Scene 1
sections.content: INT. ATTIC - DAY. Dusty boxes stacked in corners. A single beam of light illuminates an old leather box.

sections.heading: Scene 2
sections.content: EXT. COUNTRYSIDE - FLASHBACK. Two figures walking through a field of wildflowers. The sun is setting.

title: Treatment: Echoes
excerpt: A psychological thriller about memory and identity.

sections.heading: Logline
sections.content: A woman wakes in a facility with no memory of who she is and must piece together her identity before her past catches up to her.

sections.heading: Character Breakdown
sections.content: MAYA (20s) - A woman with amnesia who discovers she has skills she can't explain.

sections.heading: Act 1
sections.content: A stark white room. A woman's eyes open. She doesn't know where she is or who she is.
